task.description: Decompose the complex question into a DAG plan. Each step must include
items: `action`: one of QT, RA, DA, SA
`depends_on`: list of step ids (integers) that this step depends on (empty list if none)

examples.input: User question: Who directed Star Wars?
examples.output: [{"id":1,"action":"QT","description":"Who directed Star Wars?","depends_on":[]},{"id":2,"action":"RA","description":"Get director of Star Wars","depends_on":[1]},{"id":3,"action":"SA","description":"Combine answers","depends_on":[2]}]

rules: Output format: JSON array only, no extra text.
Each step must contain the required fields.
The final step must be SA (Summary Answer).
Do not include SAY action in the plan.
constraints: SAY itself does not produce an answer; it only plans.
Dependencies must refer to existing step ids.
